family_focus: Persist knowledge to workspace state and retrieve it across sessions.
task_shape: Multi-session workflow with file-based memory persistence.
selection_reason: Kept because it captures a useful long-horizon workflow shape: store state now, recall it later in a fresh session.
constraints: use the shared memory file as the persistence surface
notes: Also useful when designing tasks around explicit workspace state reuse.

variants.summary: Store facts in a memory file and answer recall questions in later turns or sessions.
